(o 1') [...] ....

o 2'2'

[...] UŠ₂

(o 2') [...] he will die.

o 3'3'

[...] NU DAB.DAB

(o 3') [...] ... are interlocked [...] will change; there will be chaos in the land.

o 4'4'

[...] MANni SUḪ₃ ina KUR GAL₂ši

o 5'5'

[...]-šu-nu su!(ŠU-)ḫur-ma

(o 5') [...] their [...] is curved and [...] the land will live at the command of its king.

o 6'6'

[...] x ⸢KUR⸣ ana qa-be₂-e LUGAL-ša₂ TUŠab

o 7'7'

[...]-ma KA ṣa-bi-it nen-tu-u

(o 7') [...] and the mouth is shut (and) overlapping [...] there will be [...] in the land.

o 8'8'

[...] ina KUR GAL₂ši

o 9'9'

[...] GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂-nu 2 KUN-šu₂-nu

(o 9') [...] their feet, their 2 tails [...] he will overthrow the throne.

o 10'10'

[...] x AŠ.TE i-dar-ri-iš

o 11'11'

[...] x-MEŠ-šu₂-nu GU₂.MURGU-šu₂-nu 1-ma

(o 11') [...] their [...] their backbone, just one [...] they will be disturbed by their own chaos.

o 12'12'

[...] ina SUḪ₃ NI₂-ME-ši-na LU₃-ME

o 13'13'

[... a]-bur-riš TUŠab NUN UGU KUR KUR₂-šu₂ DUGUD

(o 13') [...] he will dwell in a green pasture; the prince will become more important than his enemy's land.

o 14'14'

[... teš]-mu-u₂ u šul₃-mi ina KUR GAL₂ši

(o 14') [...] there will be obedience and well-being in the land.

o 15'15'

[...] GU₂.MURGU-šu₂-nu 2 KUN-šu₂-nu <<DIŠ>> ŠA₃-šu₂-nu 1-ma

(o 15') [...] their backbone, their 2 tails, their belly, just one [...] one will rule over the land which two ruled.

o 16'16'

[...] ⸢KUR⸣ ša₂ 2 i-be-lu-ši!(UŠ) 1 i-be-el-ša

o 17'17'

[...] 1-ma

(o 17') [...] just one [...] their 2 tails: the prince's land will expand.

o 18'18'

[...] 2 KUN-šu₂-nu NUN KUR-su DAGALiš

o 19'19'

[...] NUN KUR-su i-rap-pi₂-iš

(o 19') [...] the prince's land will expand.

o 20'20'

[...] NUN KUR-su i-rap-pi₂-iš

(o 20') [...] the prince's land will expand.

o 21'21'

[...] KUR ana DU₁₁ LUGAL-ša₂ uš-šab

(o 21') [...] the land will live at the command of its king.

o 22'22'

[...] KUR DAGALiš BAL LUGAL GI.NA

(o 22') [...] the land will expand; the king's reign will become permanent.

Reverse
r 1r 1

[...]-ma ša₂-nu-u₂ ina KA-šu₂ wa-ṣa-a LUGAL GAZ-ma

(r 1) [...] and the second is protruding from its mouth: the king will be killed and [...] his contingent and his pasturage will be destroyed.

r 22

[... KA].KEŠDA-šu₂ u na-mu-⸢šu₂⸣ it-tab-ba-ta!

r 33

[...] x GAR-ma 2 GABA-ME-šu₂-nu [x] KUN-ME-šu₂-nu

(r 3) [...] is located and their 2 chests [...] their tails [...] there will be discord in the land.

r 44

[...] ⸢la₃?⸣ ŠE.ŠE.GA ina KUR GAL₂ši

r 55

[...]-šu₂ GAR-ma DAB.DAB-ma 2 ⸢TI-ME-šu₂⸣-nu ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(⸢la₃?⸣)> ŠE.ŠE.GA ina KUR GAL₂ši

(r 5) [...] its [...] is located and their 2 ribcages are interlocked: ditto (there will be discord in the land).

r 66

[...] rak-bu taš-nin-tu₄ ⸢AŠ⸣.TE AŠ.TE i-dar-ri-iš

(r 6) [...] are superimposed: battle; a throne will overthrow (another) throne.

r 77

[...] rak-bu-ma SAG.DU-su-nu 1-ma LUGAL ša₂ KUR KUR₂ ŠU-ki KURad₂

(r 7) [...] are supersimposed and their head (is) just one: your hand will defeat the king of the enemy's land.

r 88

[...] ⸢KI⸣.TAnu ina GU₂.MURGU-šu₂-nu 1-ma 8 GIR₃-ME-šu₂-nu

(r 8) [...] is below, on their backbone (they are) 1 and their feet (are) 8 [...] their tails: a throne will overthrow (another) throne.

r 99

[...] KUN-ME-šu₂-nu gišGU.ZA AŠ.TE i-dar-ri-iš

r 1010

[...] IGI-MEŠ ZIbu DUMU LUGAL AŠ.TE AD-šu₂ DABbat

(r 10) [...] appear: attack of the king's son; he will seize his father's throne.

r 1111

[...] KI.MIN IBILA LUGAL UŠ₂

(r 11) [...] ditto; the king's heir will die.

r 1212

[... taq]-⸢ti⸣-it BAL DUMU-MEŠ LUGAL ana AŠ.TE

(r 12) [...] end of the reign; the sons of the king will [...] on the throne [...] will keep rivalling; the land will diminish.

[...] NU SA₂.SA₂nu KUR TUR

(r 15) [...] there will be [...] in the land.

(r 16) [...] he will make [...] enter his palace.
